title: pentacalia microdon
intro: Pentacalia microdon, also known as the cloud forest pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and infections. Pentacalia microdon can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
